title: Last Diplomacy Fails, Evacuations Begin
detail: Swiss backchannel collapses after Iran refuses to halt enrichment. State Dept orders 'authorized departure' from embassies in Iraq, Kuwait, Bahrain, UAE, Qatar. Airlines cancel Gulf flights. Oil hits $127/bbl.

title: Senate Passes AUMF 61-39
detail: Senate passes Iran AUMF after 14-hour session. 8 Democrats join Republicans. Authorization limited to 90 days but critics say language allows indefinite operations. Trump signs immediately.
